mapper.sql: id, panel_id, type, product_id, sort_order, full_url, pic_url, pic_url2, pic_url3, created, updated, clicking_rate, nowprice, price_fluctuation, volume, Circulation, indextext, marketprice, recommonemark, status
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from tb_panel_content
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_panel_content (id, panel_id, type, product_id, sort_order, full_url, pic_url, pic_url2, pic_url3, created, updated, clicking_rate, nowprice, price_fluctuation, volume, Circulation, indextext, marketprice, recommonemark, status) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{panelId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sortOrder,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fullUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{picUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{picUrl2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{picUrl3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{created,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{clickingRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{nowprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{priceFluctuation,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{volume,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{circulation,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{indextext,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{marketprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{recommonemark,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER})

mapper.update:
update tb_panel_content
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
panel_id = #{record.panelId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
type = #{record.type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
product_id = #{record.productId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
sort_order = #{record.sortOrder,jdbcType=INTEGER},
full_url = #{record.fullUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pic_url = #{record.picUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

pic_url3 = #{record.picUrl3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

updated = #{record.updated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
clicking_rate = #{record.clickingRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
nowprice = #{record.nowprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
price_fluctuation = #{record.priceFluctuation,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
volume = #{record.volume,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Circulation = #{record.circulation,jdbcType=INTEGER},
indextext = #{record.indextext,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
marketprice = #{record.marketprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
recommonemark = #{record.recommonemark,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},

status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
